items.summary: In the quiz score display heading (h2) on the KnowledgePage, remove the parenthetical text and its surrounding parentheses from the Metta and IFS category titles. For example, 'Metta (Loving-Kindness)' should become 'Metta', and 'IFS (Internal Family Systems)' should become 'IFS'. The change must apply wherever those category titles are rendered in the quiz score context identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/h2[1].
